facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 1,121 reviews. Down a lane in Cửa Lấp that most tourists never find.

Nora's Cafe - Restaurant earns every one of those reviews. Local crowd, real food, the kind of spot that keeps Phu Quoc from feeling like a resort brochure.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
